_note: Paste this object into the Firestore doc results/current (Database -> Start collection: 'results', Document ID: 'current'). Update fields as matches finish. Each section explained below.

_howToUse.groupResults: When a group finishes, set its key (A..L) to the actual [1st, 2nd, 3rd, 4th] finisher teamIds — copy values from src/data/teams.json.
_howToUse.groupDecided: Set to true when the corresponding group has played all matches and the standings above are final.
_howToUse.thirdPlaceAdvancers: Leave null until FIFA confirms the 8 of 12 third-place teams advancing. Then set to the sorted array of group letters, e.g. ['A','B','D','E','G','I','K','L'].
_howToUse.knockoutResults: For each knockout match (R32-1..16, R16-1..8, QF-1..4, SF-1..2, F), set the winning teamId.
_howToUse.matchDecided: Mark true for each knockout match that's been played and recorded above.
_howToUse.finalScore: Regulation time score; e.g. { home: 2, away: 1 }. Penalty-shootout wins still count as a tied finalScore.
_howToUse.finalDecided: Set true when the Final is played and finalScore is recorded.
_howToUse.updatedAt: Use Date.now() value, or any monotonically-increasing number, when you edit.
